Some Clients

I have had the great fortune to work with

About this site

A closer look

Purpose

First, to demonstrate a level of professionalism, polish and experience, with an eye and appreciation for design and user experience, as well as provide some insight into who I am, what I value and how I would fit with your team, culture and focus.

And then also, to explore areas of interest and build new skills, while providing insight into how I adopt new technologies (first passes). Current areas of focus are JavaScript (onging), React and Webpack, and soon to be added is Typescript.

Build stack

  • SCSS
  • Bootstrap
  • JavaScript
  • React*
  • NPM
  • Webpack
*For the icanhazdadjoke.com joke at the bottom of the page.
Still todo: Webpack sourceMap and testing with Jest.

Why Bootstrap?

Speed of delivery. I have years of experience hand coding layouts and designs, debugging and I am up to date on the latest tools, but as often is the case, iterating and prototyping quickly was also the fit here, so leveraging a framework was the most expedient and efficient way to see results and meet objectives.

Approach

Everything is broken down into modules and reusable parts. JavaScript is written with objects in mind and deployment versions are built from automated tasks, that compile, convert and optimize assets.

Code validates against W3C standards and tests consistently across browsers and devices. Accessibility and mobile performance reviewed and choices made based on audience, usage and priorities of this site (i.e. the 80/20 rule — move fast, deploy and iterate).

To the code (Github) Let's talk

Introductions

Focused on people and experiences

William has a wide view on the web development process.

As a young lad he left Vancouver, with a Diploma in Advanced Web Content Development in hand, for the bright lights of Toronto. There he built on his understanding of how things work with courses in .NET applications development (but that was a long time ago), project coordinating, quality assurance, frontline client support and hands-on, hand coding throughout his many years of experience.

Driven to produce better web content for all, he has helped companies such as Anderson DDB, Transcontinental, Wave Financial and many more meet their web objectives, while earning the appreciation of happy clients and a few awards along the way.

And when he's not in digital space, he can be found in the great outdoors. He loves the outdoors. Like, loves loves the outdoors, and MEC.

Checkout professional experience (CV)
